channel.title: Omar's Hi-Style Furniture — 4sale.love
channel.description: Quality furniture and home goods. AI-powered marketplace with instant offers. Chicago pickup or shipped.

item.title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
item.description: Lightly used 3 months. All accessories included: case, USB-C cable, 3.5mm adapter. Battery holds 30hrs. Like new condition.
item.g:title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Noise Cancelling Headphones
item.g:description: Lightly used 3 months. All accessories included: case, USB-C cable, 3.5mm adapter. Battery holds 30hrs.

item.title: Apple iPad Air 5th Gen 64GB WiFi + Apple Pencil 2nd Gen
item.description: Battery health 91%. Screen protector since day one — pristine display. Includes Apple Pencil 2nd gen and Smart Folio cover in navy.
item.g:title: Apple iPad Air 5th Gen 64GB WiFi + Apple Pencil 2nd Gen
item.g:description: Battery health 91%. Screen protector since day one. Includes Pencil 2nd gen and Smart Folio.

item.title: IKEA MALM 6-Drawer Dresser White
item.description: Moving sale. Solid condition, minor scuff on bottom drawer. Easy to disassemble. Chicago pickup required.
item.g:title: IKEA MALM 6-Drawer Dresser White
item.g:description: Moving sale. Solid condition, minor scuff on bottom drawer. Easy to disassemble.

item.title: Vitamix E310 Explorian Blender
item.description: Works perfectly. All original parts, barely used. Retails $450 new. Variable speed and pulse. Selling for built-in upgrade.
item.g:title: Vitamix E310 Explorian Blender
item.g:description: Works perfectly. All original parts, barely used. Variable speed and pulse.
